title: campanula glomerata var. foliosa
intro: Campanula glomerata var. foliosa, also known as clustered bellflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata var. foliosa may include relief from fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
